headline: Concentration and equity factor exposure dominate the current portfolio risk story.
nextStep: Open Evidence Center before testing any candidate hypothesis.
boundaryNote: Diagnosis explains observed portfolio structure; it is not a suitability review or trading instruction.
drivers: US large-cap equity concentration remains the largest risk driver.
Growth/technology sensitivity is elevated through overlapping SPY and QQQ exposure.
Bonds and gold provide partial shock absorbers, but not enough to remove stress fragility.
